issues.description: Rest action is incorrect. The card says 'You may rest this Character' as a cost/option, not as an action. The ability should NOT include Rest as an action.
SearchDeck filter is incomplete. Must specify type filter for '{Land of Wano}' type cards, not 'Any'. Should include cardType or similar constraint.

SearchDeck is missing the 'look' mechanic. Card explicitly states 'Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1...' This requires viewing 5 cards and selecting up to 1, then returning others to bottom in any order. Current DSL lacks this nuance.
Missing action for returning non-selected cards to bottom of deck. The card text requires placing the rest at the bottom in any order, which is not represented.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] ➀ (You may rest the specified number of DON!! cards in your cost area.) You may rest this Character: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Land of Wano} type card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.
